package rulefixtures

import (
	jwt "github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
)

// scenario for jwt_secret_in_source: `jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodHS256, claims).SignedString([]byte("hardcoded"))` where the signing key is a string literal
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: error.
func scenario723Positive(claims jwt.Claims) (string, error) {
	return jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodHS256, claims).SignedString([]byte("hardcoded"))
}
